subhead: Aphilio extracts your brand DNA (colors, fonts, logo, and voice) directly from any live website, then generates ads and visuals that actually match your brand.
howTitle: From URL to on-brand ad creatives in three steps
step1Description: Drop any link and Aphilio opens it in a real browser session, reading your live page as it renders, not a cached version.
step2Title: DNA extracts your full brand profile
step2Description: Colors, typography, logos, voice, personality, and marketing angles are captured and structured into a reusable brand profile.
step3Description: Use your DNA profile in the Ad Studio or AI Chat to generate on-brand images, copy, and ads in multiple formats in seconds.
previewTitle: What DNA captures from your URL
featuresTitle: Three tools. One brand. Everything on-brand.
featureSourceDescription: Paste any URL and get a complete brand profile: colors, typography, logos, voice, personality, and marketing angles, extracted from the live site in seconds.
featureShipDescription: Pick marketing angles, choose ad templates, and generate multiple formats (1:1, 4:5, 9:16, 16:9) grounded in your exact brand DNA.
featureAccountDescription: Describe what you need in plain language. The AI retrieves your brand context and generates on-brand visuals directly in the conversation.
ctaBandTitle: Ready to extract your brand's DNA?
ctaBandDescription: Sign in with Google, paste your site URL, and get a full brand profile in under five minutes.
whyTitle: Built different from generic AI tools
whyItem1Desc: We open your URL in an actual browser session so we capture what users see — live colors, rendered fonts, and real images, not raw HTML.
whyItem2Desc: Colors, typography, logos, voice, personality, and marketing angles — all structured into a reusable profile that lives in your workspace.
whyItem3Title: AI outputs locked to your brand
whyItem3Desc: Every generated image, headline, and ad is grounded in your exact DNA profile. The AI cannot stray from your brand identity.
whyItem4Desc: Square, portrait, story, and landscape — generate all four aspect ratios at once and ship to any placement without manual resizing.
pricingSubtitle: Full access to every feature. Switch or cancel anytime.
pricingProF2: Ad Creative Studio — all formats & layouts
pricingProF3: Brand-aware AI chat with image generation
